# CWE-341 vulnerable: Predictable from Observable State (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-341-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"time"
)

func BuildPairingCode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	device := r.URL.Query().Get("device")
	code := fmt.Sprintf("%d-%d-%s", os.Getpid(), time.Now().Unix(), device)
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO pairing_codes (code) VALUES (?)", code)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	return nil
}
